data.content: Fixed all three review issues: (1) daily rollover - ensureStream() now computes date on each write and opens new WriteStream when date changes, (2) stream error handling - added stream.on('error') handler to swallow IO errors, (3) added 4 new tests covering daily rollover, uncaughtException capture, unhandledRejection capture, and stream error resilience. All 8 tests pass. Exported _dateNow/_setDateNow for test date injection.
